nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=42 beats='the sun slips down and the sky turns soft purple over the sleepy meadow; high above, Twinkle the littlest star wakes up in her fluffy cloud bed and rubs her eyes; tonight is her very first night to shine all by herself'>>

choices.label: Peek out at the evening sky.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=40 beats='kind round Moon rises slowly and smiles at Twinkle; Moon whispers that the big quiet sky is waiting for her little light; Twinkle feels fluttery and shy in her tummy, so she squeezes her points tight and gets ready to be brave'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=40 beats='Twinkle floats to her very own spot in the sky and wonders how to start shining; she could hide behind the fluffy cloud first, or do a big wiggle to wake up her sparkle, or scoot down low to peek at the world below'>>

choices.label: Scoot down low to peek at the world.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=40 beats='Twinkle tucks herself behind the fluffy cloud so only the very tip of her glow peeks out; the cloud is soft and cozy, but her spot in the sky stays dark and empty; she can snuggle deeper into the fluff or peek out one tiny sparkle'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='deep in the cozy cloud Twinkle rests a little while and Moon hums one soft low note; the cloud fluff tickles her nose and she giggles a tiny giggle; the rest makes her feel a little braver, so she floats back toward her spot to try again'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='one tiny sparkle slips out and drifts all the way down to the dark meadow, where a firefly blinks hello back up at her; Twinkle gasps with joy, her little light reached somebody; her glow steadies and grows a bit warmer and bolder'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=40 beats='Twinkle wiggles and jiggles to wake up her sparkle, and gold glitter shakes off her points in every direction; it is very fun but very wobbly, and her light flickers like a hiccup; she can wiggle even faster or slow down and sway like a lullaby'>>

choices.label: Slow down and sway like a lullaby.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='Twinkle wiggles so fast she spins in a dizzy circle and plops onto a puff of cloud, giggling; her sparkle goes all fizzy like tiny bubbles; Moon chuckles kindly and says gently does it, little one, so she dusts off her points and floats back to try again'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=36 beats='Twinkle sways slowly, side to side, like the tall grass in the meadow far below; her sparkle settles into one warm, steady glow; the swaying feels just like a lullaby and she hums along softly, calm and ready at last'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=40 beats='Twinkle scoots down the dark blue sky to peek at the world, but whoops, the sky is slippery tonight and she slides down, down, down to just above the treetops; she can grab a silvery moonbeam and climb right back up, or take a little peek around from down low'>>

choices.label: Take a peek from down low.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='from down low Twinkle sees little houses with warm yellow windows, and children in pajamas peeking up, waiting for the very first star; her heart glows warm as toast; the children need her light tonight, so she floats up and up toward her spot in the sky'>>

choices.label: Float up to her spot in the sky.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=40 beats='back at her very own spot, the sky finally feels just right, soft and dark and quiet as a blanket; Moon nods proudly and the whole night seems to wait; Twinkle can try one tiny practice sparkle first, or hold onto a moonbeam and shine all at once'>>

choices.label: Hold a moonbeam and shine all at once.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=36 beats='Twinkle lets out one small practice sparkle and it glows steady and bright, not wobbly at all; she laughs out loud with happy surprise; her shyness floats away like a little cloud, and now she is truly ready to shine her whole light'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=42 beats='Twinkle takes the biggest breath of all and shines, and her silver light spills soft and bright across the whole quiet sky; Moon beams with pride; now Twinkle can wink goodnight to the children below, or sing a twinkle song with Moon, or invite the other little stars to shine along'>>

choices.label: Sing a twinkle song with Moon.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=44 beats='Twinkle twinkles a slow, gentle goodnight wink, and far below the children wave from their windows and snuggle into their beds; the meadow grows quiet and dreamy under her soft silver light; Twinkle shines calm and proud, the littlest star, right where she belongs'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=44 beats='Twinkle and Moon hum a soft twinkle-twinkle song together while the sky rocks slow and gentle like a cradle; her light glows in time with the tune; down below, sleepy eyes close one by one; Twinkle sings the whole world to sleep and is not one bit shy anymore'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=44 beats='Twinkle calls out softly and one by one the other little stars pop out beside her, blinking hello until the sky is full of friendly lights; shining is easy with friends all around; Twinkle glows happiest of all, the sleepy little star who lit up the whole night'>>
